text: Natural language processing, or NLP, is a field of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand and work with human language. It goes beyond simply reading words; it focuses on text understanding by analyzing grammar, meaning, and context. This technology powers many everyday tools. For example, translation services can convert text from one language to another, allowing people to communicate across borders. Another important application is sentiment analysis, which determines whether a piece of writing expresses a positive, negative, or neutral emotion. Additionally, chatbots use NLP to hold conversations, answer questions, and provide customer support. From checking your email’s spam filter to asking your phone for directions, NLP is making communication between humans and machines smoother and more natural.
